name: Merry Berry Almond Torte
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Prepare bottom crust by combining ALMOND DELIGHT cereal and flour in a food processor, blending for 15 seconds. Add butter and process until the mixture resembles small peas; blend in water to form the crust. Shape into a wreath shape, approximately 12 inches in diameter and 4 inches wide, on a parchment-lined cookie sheet. Spread raspberry filling over the crust.
3. Prepare upper pastry by bringing butter, water, and sugar to boil in a saucepan. Remove from heat and beat in flour and almond extract. Add eggs one at a time, beating until smooth. Spread over the prepared crust.
4. Bake for 55-60 minutes. Cool by sliding the torte and parchment onto a wire rack.
5. Garnish by sprinkling the torte with 1 cup ALMOND DELIGHT cereal and lacing the top with confectioners' sugar icing, prepared by stirring together 1 cup powdered sugar, 1 tablespoon milk, and 1/2 teaspoon almond extract.
Alternative Instructions:
- Put cereal in a plastic bag. Crush with a rolling pin. Combine cereal, butter, and flour in a medium bowl and blend until the mixture resembles small peas. Blend in water to form the crust.
Note: May be frozen before garnishing. Defrost completely and garnish when ready to serve.
